security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://i.ytimg.com https://*.googleusercontent.com; media-src 'self' blob: asset: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://youtube.com
